title: athyrium arcuatum
intro: Athyrium arcuatum, also known as the curved lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium arcuatum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
